docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANNEL PARTNERS CAPITAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LT ENERGY CONSTRUCTION SOLUTIONS, INC.
